checks.description: Guardrail: wave must stay within 0..31 and reverse direction at the bounds.
checks.pass_condition: wave never exceeds 31 or goes below 0; when wave reaches 31 it does not increase further, and when it reaches 0 it does not decrease further.
checks.trigger_condition: After reset is released and during observation of edge behavior.

checks.description: wave changes by at most +/-1 per clock edge after reset.
checks.pass_condition: Between consecutive observed clock edges, wave value changes by either +1, -1, or remains unchanged when at a bound.
checks.trigger_condition: On each clock edge after reset release.
